arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the ECS task definition.

arn_without_revision.description: The ARN of the ECS task definition without the version number.

execution_role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that grants the ECS task the permissions to execute.

family.description: The family name of the ECS task definition, which groups multiple versions.

id.description: The unique ID of the ECS task definition.

network_mode.description: The network mode associated with the ECS task definition.

revision.description: The revision number of the ECS task definition, indicating its version.

status.description: The status of the ECS task definition, such as 'ACTIVE' or 'INACTIVE'.

task_role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that the ECS task can assume.
